com.mentor.chs.api

Interface IXSplice

  • All Superinterfaces:
    IXAbstractPinList, IXConnectivityObject, IXInternalPositionedObject, IXInternalPositionsContainer, IXLibrariedObject, IXModuledObject, IXObject, IXPinList<IXAbstractPin>, IXWriteableObject

    public interface IXSplice
extends IXAbstractPinList, IXLibrariedObject, IXInternalPositionsContainer, IXInternalPositionedObject, IXModuledObject
    Interface providing access to center strip wires, signal, harness, harness levels and nodes as well as a marker for whether or not the splice is itself center stripped.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      java.util.Set<IXWire> getCenterstripWires()
      Get the center strip wires associated with this splice.
      IXHarness getHarness()
      Get the harness that owns this splice.
      java.util.Set<IXHarnessLevel> getHarnessLevels()
      Get the harness levels on which this splice is active.
      IXNode getNode()
      Get the node at which this splice exists.
      IXSplice getPrimaryPositionSplice()
      Get the primary position splice if the splice is a variant position.
      IXSignal getSignal()
      Get the signal carried by connections to this splice.
      IXSlot getSlot()
      Get the slot in which this splice lives.
      java.util.Set<IXSplice> getVariantPositionSplices()
      Get any variant position splices.
      boolean isCenterstrip()
      Is this a center strip splice?

        getPins

      • Methods inherited from interface com.mentor.chs.api.IXConnectivityObject

        getAssembly, getDesign, getInstances, getInstances

    • Method Detail

      • getCenterstripWires

        java.util.Set<IXWire> getCenterstripWires()
        Get the center strip wires associated with this splice. Note that wires terminated at pins of this splice are accessed with the getPins() method.
        Returns:
        a Set of wires that are center stripped at this splice, an empty Set otherwise.

      • getSignal

        IXSignal getSignal()
        Get the signal carried by connections to this splice. Note that this method only has relevance if the splice is in a Capital Integrator design.
        Returns:
        the signal carried by this splice, null otherwise.

      • getHarness

        IXHarness getHarness()
        Get the harness that owns this splice. Note that this method only has relevance if the splice is in a Capital Integrator design.
        Returns:
        the harness owning this splice if one exists, null otherwise.

      • getHarnessLevels

        java.util.Set<IXHarnessLevel> getHarnessLevels()
        Get the harness levels on which this splice is active. Note that this method only has relevance if the splice is in a Capital Integrator design.
        Returns:
        a Set of the harness levels on which this splice is active if any, an empty Set otherwise.

      • getNode

        IXNode getNode()
        Get the node at which this splice exists. Note that this method only has relevance if the splice is in a Capital Integrator design.
        Returns:
        the node at which this splice exists if it exists, null otherwise.

      • getSlot

        IXSlot getSlot()
        Get the slot in which this splice lives. Note that this method only has relevance if the splice is in a Capital Integrator design.
        Returns:
        the slot inside which this splice exists if it does, null otherwise.

      • isCenterstrip

        boolean isCenterstrip()
        Is this a center strip splice?
        Returns:
        true if it is a center strip splice, false if not.

      • getVariantPositionSplices

        java.util.Set<IXSplice> getVariantPositionSplices()
        Get any variant position splices.
        Returns:
        the variant position splices (if any), an empty Set otherwise.

      • getPrimaryPositionSplice

        IXSplice getPrimaryPositionSplice()
        Get the primary position splice if the splice is a variant position.
        Returns:
        the primary position splice if the splice is a variant position splice, null otherwise.
